beskrivelse: Find volunteering near you — one of the easiest ways to meet people across generations (Norwegian site).
The Norwegian Trekking Association runs hikes and walking groups for every level. Movement and community in one.
Municipal groups for walks, exercise and cooking — free and social. Found in most Norwegian municipalities.
Check your municipality's event calendar and the library — concerts, courses, talks and gathering places right in the neighbourhood.
Blue zones people rarely eat alone. Invite a neighbour, a friend or family to a simple meal this week.
